sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5807" key="a)mfi/dusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίδῠσις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n5807.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">double cup,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δέπας ἀμφικύπελλον</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
